title: Accessing Monday doc from Kanban view
excerpt: We use the Monday docs pretty extensively, attaching them to task items with details of the task to be performed.  We’re running into a nuisance issue though.  When we are in Kanban view and click on a “Monday doc” link …

posts.author: sfeagans (Shawn Feagans)
posts.cookedHtml: We use the Monday docs pretty extensively, attaching them to task items with details of the task to be performed. We’re running into a nuisance issue though. When we are in Kanban view and click on a “Monday doc” link in the “Files” field of a task, the doc opens correctly…but, when we close the doc, it does not return us to Kanban view - it returns us to the Main Table view. We have to toggle over to the Main Table view, then back to Kanban to return to Kanban view. It’s not a huge issue, but is aggravating - are others running into this?

posts.author: steven.glickman (Steven Glickman)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. This is incredibly annoying, especially since we’re using the kanban view to simplify things for our less technically inclined team members, and part of their task is to fill out complete workdocs.

posts.author: Lorelle (Lorelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are setting up support documentation for our team members that includes videos, documents, and all kinds of training material. We want to move these off YouTube and Google Docs and have them in Monday.com workdocs and the videos just straight upload - due to the fact that our team members are from around the world and YouTube is restricted from time to time in some regions.

Right now, we are NOT seeing the Workdocs column in the kanban view, and when we close other files, it jumps away from the Kanban, which Steven pointed out - frustrates our users, especially those unfamiliar with Monday.com.

Any other solutions? Thanks.

posts.author: jshubert (Jeremy Shubert)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, happening in card view as well, very annoying.

posts.author: pat-mixing-light (Patrick Inhofer)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. We wasted time thinking it was a bug with our board that the Monday Dacs column didn’t show up as a Kanban Card display item. Finally, after trying a few things to make it show up, it took a 10 minute support chat (including posting screen shots) to figure out it wasn’t us or a buggy board.
